name: WF24: Mock arbitration simulator -> AI opponent + scoring

parameters.subject: Mock Arbitration Session Ready - {{ $json.case_type }}
parameters.html:
Mock Arbitration Session Ready

Dear {{ $('Get User Profile').first().json.full_name }},

Your mock arbitration session has been set up and is ready to begin!

Session Details:

  • Case Type: {{ $json.case_type }}
  • Difficulty: {{ $json.difficulty }}
  • Session ID: {{ $json.session_id }}

What to Expect:

You will be engaging in a realistic arbitration simulation with an AI opponent who will:

  • Present challenging arbitration scenarios
  • Respond to your arguments and positions
  • Test your knowledge of arbitration procedures
  • Provide educational feedback based on your performance

Getting Started:

Start Mock Arbitration

Tips for Success:

  • Review relevant arbitration rules and procedures
  • Prepare your opening statement carefully
  • Listen actively to the AI opponent's arguments
  • Apply legal reasoning and precedents
  • Maintain professional arbitration conduct

This session will help you practice and improve your arbitration skills in a risk-free environment.

Good luck with your mock arbitration!

Best regards,
The CIMA Team

parameters.subject: Mock Arbitration Completed - Score: {{ $json.final_score }}/100
parameters.html:
Mock Arbitration Session Completed

Dear {{ $('Get User Profile').first().json.full_name }},

Congratulations on completing your mock arbitration session! Here are your results:

Final Score

{{ $json.final_score }}/100

Performance Feedback

{{ $('Generate Final Feedback').first().json.choices[0].message.content }}

Next Steps

Based on your performance, we recommend:

  • Review areas where you lost points
  • Practice specific arbitration skills
  • Consider taking advanced arbitration courses
  • Schedule a consultation with an instructor

View Detailed Results

Practice More Scenarios

Continue practicing to improve your arbitration skills. Each session helps you become more confident and competent in real arbitration proceedings.

Best regards,
The CIMA Team
